name: libsys-hostname-long-perl
title: libsys-hostname-long-perl
summary: module tp determine the long (fully-qualified) hostname
description:
module tp determine the long (fully-qualified) hostname
Sys::Hostname::Long determines the host full name on multiple
operating systems (MacOS, Windows, Unix-like systems; more later.)
.
The Sys::Hostname class is the best and standard way to get the basic
hostname, but that may not be fully qualified.  This module tries to
determine the host's fully qualified name.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libsys-hostname-long-perl because module tp determine the long (fully-qualified) hostname.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libsys-hostname-long-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libsys-hostname-long-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libsys-hostname-long-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
